message:
fix(web): Resolve React Compiler errors in scoped components

- Fleet.tsx: Extract complex ternary calculation to needsAttention const
- CollaborationGraph.tsx: Remove useMemo for selectedNode, let compiler handle
- Setup.tsx: Refactor try/finally to duplicate cleanup in try/catch blocks
- DeviceCodeFlow.tsx: Remove useCallback for handleOpenUrl
- OnboardingWizard.tsx: Extract logical OR computation outside try block
- useDashboard.ts: Extract err variable before setState callback
- useCollabGraph.ts: Add connectRef to avoid self-referencing in setTimeout

All bead-scoped files now have zero React Compiler errors.
Remaining 32 errors are try/finally compiler limitations (Todo category)
in hooks files outside original scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
